categories.description: Default loadout at default tuning — the reference ship.

scenarios.name: Reference ship
scenarios.description: Pioneer hull, Epoch-S, DR-505, VRS Mk I, Aegis Delta, Nav Tier 3. All tuning at 1.0.

categories.description: Verify each tuning param only affects its own system. Compare against baseline.

scenarios.name: Baseline (all 1.0)
scenarios.description: Reference point for isolation checks.

scenarios.name: Throttle only (2.0)
scenarios.description: Only throttle changed. Scan and shield should be identical to baseline.

scenarios.name: Effort only (2.0)
scenarios.description: Only effort changed. Jump and shield should be identical to baseline.

scenarios.name: Priority only (2.0)
scenarios.description: Only priority changed. Jump and scan should be identical to baseline.

categories.description: Ship-physics Section 4 constraints. Capacitor=100. Comfort jump=7ly (56 power), comfort scan=5ly (10 power).

scenarios.name: Comfort-range jump power cost
scenarios.description: Jump 7ly costs 56 power = 56% of capacitor. Target: 50-70%.

scenarios.name: Comfort-range scan power cost
scenarios.description: Scan 5ly costs 10 power = 10% of capacitor. Target: should not deplete.

scenarios.name: Jump + scan back-to-back
scenarios.description: Combined 66 power = 66% of capacitor. Target: should exceed capacity.

scenarios.name: Shield draw vs regen
scenarios.description: Shield draw=5, core regen=10/hr. Regen should outpace draw when idle.

categories.description: Crossover products in isolation, comparison, and synergy builds (11 scenarios).

scenarios.name: aegis_testudo (solo)
scenarios.description: Aegis Testudo in default loadout. Crossover baseline.

scenarios.name: epoch_sensor_2 (solo)
scenarios.description: Epoch Sensor 2 in default loadout. Crossover baseline.

scenarios.name: dsc_shield_mk2 (solo)
scenarios.description: DSC Shield Mk II in default loadout. Crossover baseline.

scenarios.name: dr_307 (native comparison)
scenarios.description: DR-307. Native Mk II counterpart for crossover comparison.

scenarios.name: acu_mk2 (native comparison)
scenarios.description: ACU Mk II. Native Mk II counterpart for crossover comparison.

scenarios.name: aegis_beta (native comparison)
scenarios.description: Aegis Beta. Native Mk II counterpart for crossover comparison.

scenarios.name: Epoch-E + Aegis Testudo (endurance + shield-regen)
scenarios.description: Endurance core with shield-regen drive. Maximum sustained shield uptime.

scenarios.name: Epoch-R + Aegis Testudo (rapid + shield-regen)
scenarios.description: Rapid core with shield-regen drive. Worst crossover perfRatio — high consumption, low output.

scenarios.name: Epoch-E + Epoch Sensor 2 (endurance + core-resonance)
scenarios.description: Endurance core with core-resonance scanner. Maximum scan endurance.

scenarios.name: DSC Mk II + DSC Shield (sensor + sensor-coupled shield)
scenarios.description: DSC sensor with sensor-coupled shield. Maximum passive range synergy.

scenarios.name: Full crossover loadout
scenarios.description: All three crossovers equipped simultaneously. Aegis Testudo + Epoch Sensor 2 + DSC Shield.

scenarios.name: DR-705 + Epoch-E (worst perfRatio)
scenarios.description: perfRatio = min(1.0, 0.9/1.5) = 0.6. Lowest efficiency combo — verify usable numbers.

scenarios.name: Aegis Eta @ priority=2.0 (highest draw)
scenarios.description: draw=16 at priority 2.0. Check draw vs capacitor headroom.

scenarios.name: Aegis Eta @ priority=3.0 (max specialization)
scenarios.description: Rapid Recovery specialization max. draw=24 at priority 3.0.

scenarios.name: Scout hull (lightest)
scenarios.description: Small hull, mass 0.7. Tighter internal space — check if constraints still hold.

scenarios.name: Bulwark hull (heaviest)
scenarios.description: Mass 1.4, largest internal space. Check power budget ratios.

scenarios.name: All economy (Epoch-E + DR-305 + ACU Mk I + Aegis Alpha)
scenarios.description: Cheapest, most efficient components. Maximum range, minimum performance.

scenarios.name: All performance (Epoch-R + DR-705 + DSC Mk I + Aegis Eta)
scenarios.description: Highest performance components. Maximum speed, minimum efficiency.

scenarios.name: Epoch-R + Aegis Testudo (worst crossover perfRatio)
scenarios.description: Rapid core (highest output) with crossover drive. Worst perfRatio among crossover combos.

scenarios.name: DSC Shield @ priority=1.5 (crossover max priority)
scenarios.description: Sensor-coupled shield at elevated priority. Crossover draw scaling.

scenarios.name: Scout hull + full crossover loadout
scenarios.description: Tightest internal space with all three crossover products. Footprint pressure test.
